name: Vimeo
description: Professional video hosting and streaming platform
longDescription:
Vimeo is a video hosting platform aimed at creators, businesses, and education. Unlike open social video sites, Vimeo emphasizes ad-free playback, customizable players, and tools for embedding videos on company websites or sharing privately with clients.

The service supports high-quality uploads, password-protected videos, custom domain embedding, analytics, and live streaming. Built-in tools cover screen recording, video editing, AI-assisted scripting, and webinar hosting, making it useful for marketing teams, training departments, and independent filmmakers.

Vimeo's plans range from a free tier with limited storage to enterprise tiers that add SSO, SCIM, and team collaboration. The platform is also a long-standing home for short films and creative video work.

features.title: Customizable player
features.description: Embed videos with a branded player that matches your site's colors, logo, and call-to-action overlays.

features.title: Privacy controls
features.description: Restrict videos by password, domain, single sign-on, or share them with private review links.

features.title: Live streaming
features.description: Broadcast events, webinars, and panels with simulcasting to YouTube, LinkedIn, and other destinations.

features.title: Video creation tools
features.description: Built-in screen recorder, stock footage library, and AI script generation help produce videos in-app.

features.title: Analytics
features.description: Track engagement, drop-off, and audience demographics to understand how viewers interact with each video.

useCases: Hosting marketing videos with a clean, ad-free embedded player
Sharing private review cuts with clients before public release
Streaming webinars, conferences, and internal company events live
Selling video on demand directly to a paying audience

faq.question: Is Vimeo free?
faq.answer: Vimeo has a limited free tier and several paid plans (Starter, Standard, Advanced, Enterprise) with increasing storage, features, and team controls.

faq.question: Does Vimeo show ads on my videos?
faq.answer: No, Vimeo does not insert ads on uploaded videos, even on the free plan.

faq.question: Can I embed Vimeo videos on my website?
faq.answer: Yes, all plans support embedding, and paid plans add domain restrictions and a fully branded player.

faq.question: Does Vimeo support live streaming?
faq.answer: Yes, live streaming is available on Standard and higher plans, with simulcasting to other platforms on advanced tiers.
